fields.confirmAccuracy: I hereby certify that all information provided is accurate and complete.

replacement.title: License Replacement
replacement.subtitle: Request a replacement for your license

declaration.title: Declaration
declaration.text: I hereby declare that the information provided is true and correct, and I assume full legal responsibility for any incorrect information.
declaration.checkbox: I agree to the terms and conditions
declaration.required: You must agree to the declaration

upload.title: Upload Required Documents
upload.noDocs: No documents required for lost license replacement.

employeeReview.error: An error occurred while updating verification status
employeeReview.commentsRequired: Comments must be at least 5 characters long

employeeReview.verifyReportDesc: The applicant reported the license as stolen. Please verify the police report.

payment.title: Payment
payment.success: Payment successful! Your application is now processing.
payment.error: Failed to process final payment for application.
